things.name: South Bank Parklands
things.description: 16-hectare cultural precinct with Streets Beach (inner-city lagoon), market, galleries and river walk

things.name: Lone Pine Koala Sanctuary
things.description: World's first and largest koala sanctuary — cuddle a koala, hand-feed kangaroos and meet platypuses

things.name: Story Bridge Adventure Climb
things.description: Scale the iconic 1940 steel bridge for 360° panoramic views of Brisbane — day, twilight or night climbs

things.name: Gold Coast Day Trip
things.description: Australia's surf capital just 1 hour south — theme parks, Surfers Paradise Beach and the hinterland rainforest

things.name: Queensland Museum
things.description: Natural history and science museum with the famous whale skeleton and extensive dinosaur gallery

things.name: Mount Coot-tha Lookout
things.description: Best panoramic view of the Brisbane city skyline and Moreton Bay — summit accessible by bus or car

things.name: GOMA (Gallery of Modern Art)
things.description: Australia's largest contemporary art museum — outstanding collection and free admission to the permanent collection

things.name: Moreton Island Day Trip
things.description: The world's third-largest sand island — sandboarding down the Tangalooma desert, snorkelling wrecks

things.name: Fortitude Valley
things.description: Brisbane's nightlife and live music hub — the Valley has hosted Springsteen, U2 and the Rolling Stones

things.name: Brisbane City Botanic Gardens
things.description: Queensland's oldest garden (1855) on a river peninsula — figs, bamboo groves and free outdoor cinema
